name: table
label: Table
description: Table storing one region per record, e.g. a custom 'u_geo_region' table.

name: filter
label: Filter (encoded query)
description: Optional encoded query to scope the regions.

name: geometryField
label: Geometry field
description: Field holding a GeoJSON geometry (a JSON string, or a Feature/geometry object).

name: idField
label: Id field
description: Field used as the feature id (properties.id).

name: nameField
label: Name field
description: Field used as the feature display name (properties.name).

name: valueField
label: Value field
description: Numeric field read per record into properties.value (the choropleth metric).
